final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing poster for a premium beauty serum product.

Style/medium: needs a luxurious and refined aesthetic suitable for social media promotion — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include the serum bottle as central focal point with surrounding rose petals and water droplets
Subject: must include a glass serum bottle with pale golden liquid visible through the glass
Scene/backdrop: must be a soft pink gradient background
Lighting/mood: needs a soft and natural light atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: must be soft pink dominant with pale golden accents
Materials/textures: needs a premium surface treatment — exact glass transparency and petal texture are yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: 
Avoid:
